name: Braised Lamb Shanks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Heat the olive oil over medium heat in a heavy roasting pan or Dutch oven large enough to hold the shanks in one layer on the stove.
3. Add the lamb shanks and cook for 10 minutes on each side.
4. Pour off all but 2 tablespoons of fat, then add the onion, carrot, and celery. Cook for 5 minutes.
5. Add the garlic, wine, water, lemon, salt, and pepper.
6. Cover and place in the oven. Cook for 1 and 1/2 hours or until tender. Turn the lamb every 30 minutes to ensure even cooking and check that the liquid has not evaporated. If necessary, add another cup of water.
7. When the lamb is tender, remove the shanks from the sauce and strain the sauce through a fine sieve. Discard the vegetables.
8. Skim and discard fat from the surface of the braising liquid.
9. Serve the lamb shanks on a platter with the braising liquid on the side.
